creator: ady@freebsd.ady.ro
text:
Hi,

  Please note that as of current state both Pine 3.96 and Pine 4.00
ports have the Spell feature disabled in Pico and left enabled in Pine
(so that you may use it by specifying an external speller); this
decision was taken because Pico cannot use an external editor and the
default speller specified at the build time with SPELLER doesn't exist.

  I'd be happy to hear your comments !

PS: holding ^T doesn't crush neither Pine 4.00 nor Pine 3.96 (at least
not for me, under 2.2.6-REL and 3.0-980520-SNAP)...

  Thank you,
  Ady (@freebsd.ady.ro)
